confirms.transfer:
Send TZS {amount} to account {account}?

This action cannot be undone.
confirms.bill:
Pay TZS {amount} to {biller}?

This action cannot be undone.

phrases.A modern fintech workspace for encrypted: A modern fintech workspace for encrypted wallets, protected transfers, payment operations, and audit-ready financial activity.
phrases.Track balances, encrypted account number: Track balances, encrypted account numbers, and payment activity in a focused dashboard.
phrases.Send funds with validation, atomic updat: Send funds with validation, atomic updates, and transaction history built into the flow.
phrases.Pay common billers with clear references: Pay common billers with clear references, audit logging, and status tracking.
phrases.Premium cards and visual metrics make ac: Premium cards and visual metrics make account activity easy to scan at a glance.
phrases.SecureMoney keeps the backend stack unch: SecureMoney keeps the backend stack unchanged while presenting a polished SaaS interface around authentication, OTP verification, and encrypted balances.
phrases.Enterprise fintech interface for secure: Enterprise fintech interface for secure payment operations.
phrases.Transaction values remain encrypted at r: Transaction values remain encrypted at rest.
phrases.Sign in to your SecureMoney account: Sign in to your SecureMoney account
phrases.All session data and financial records a: All session data and financial records are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Your password is never stored — only a PBKDF2 hash with 600,000 iterations.
phrases.Bank-grade AES-256-GCM encryption protec: Bank-grade AES-256-GCM encryption protects every transaction. Your finances, secured by cryptographic proof.
phrases.Fill in your details to get started: Fill in your details to get started
phrases.Join thousands of users who trust Secure: Join thousands of users who trust SecureMoney for secure digital payments in Tanzania.
phrases.A one-time passcode has been sent to you: A one-time passcode has been sent to your registered email. This extra step ensures only you can access your account.
phrases.In production, OTP is sent via email/SMS: In production, OTP is sent via email/SMS. In development, use the code below:
phrases.This code is also printed to the Flask c: This code is also printed to the Flask console
phrases.in the database. Decryption occurs only: in the database. Decryption occurs only in the application layer — the database never sees plaintext values. Compliant with
phrases.Transfer funds to another SecureMoney ac: Transfer funds to another SecureMoney account
phrases.The transfer amount is encrypted with a: The transfer amount is encrypted with a unique key derived from PBKDF2 before being stored in the database.
phrases.Debit and credit happen in a single data: Debit and credit happen in a single database transaction — partial failures are rolled back.
phrases.All transfers are recorded in the tamper: All transfers are recorded in the tamper-proof audit log.
phrases.Pay TANESCO, DAWASCO, NHIF, and more: Pay TANESCO, DAWASCO, NHIF, and more
phrases.Payment amount encrypted with AES-256-GC: Payment amount encrypted with AES-256-GCM before storage
phrases.Full audit trail in tamper-proof log: Full audit trail in tamper-proof log
phrases.Email notification sent on successful pa: Email notification sent on successful payment
phrases.Operational oversight for SecureMoney au: Operational oversight for SecureMoney audit activity and platform health.
phrases.Use the seeded admin credentials to cont: Use the seeded admin credentials to continue
phrases.You don't have permission to access this: You don't have permission to access this page.
phrases.The page you're looking for doesn't exis: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
phrases.Too many requests. Please wait a moment: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
phrases.Something went wrong on our end. Please: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

attributes.Account format: SM followed by 8 digits: Account format: SM followed by 8 digits
